step0.title: Hello!
step0.subtitle: I'm Trasa — your personal guide for exploring Kraków.
step0.speech: Hello! I'm Trasa — your personal guide for exploring Kraków.

step1.title: You talk — AI plans
step1.subtitle: Tell me what you want to see. In seconds I'll build a plan tailored exactly to you.
step1.speech: You talk naturally, and I plan the perfect day for you.

step2.title: I learn your tastes
step2.subtitle: After every trip I get to know you better. Recommendations become more and more spot-on.
step2.speech: After every trip I learn your preferences and recommend more accurately.

prefs_speech: Before we start — tell me a bit about yourself and we'll tailor a travel plan just for you!

prefs.title: Tell us about yourself
prefs.subtitle: We'll tailor your travel plan to your preferences.
prefs.free_text_label: Describe yourself in your own words
prefs.free_text_placeholder: E.g. I love art and good coffee, I travel slowly with my camera...
prefs.interests_section: What do you like to explore
